title: VEYLIN 12 Pack Christmas Kraft Gift Bag With Handle and Tag Tissue Paper for Xmas Present Wrapping Decoration (9.1 x 3.5 x 5.9 Inches)
features: Package: 12 pack paper gift bags with handle in 12 different Christmas designs, include 12 red & green tissue paper and 12 Xmas tags, ideal for Xmas party supplies decoration.
Design: Classic Christmas colors and styles, 12 different holiday unique design of snowflakes, bell, reindeer, snowman, Christmas tree etc, suitable for serving as Xmas gift bags.
Size: The size of the Christmas bags is approx 23 x 9 x 15cm/9.1 x 3.5 x 5.9inch. Fill them with your Christmas presents and put them by your tree for the perfect Holiday effect.
Material: The Christmas gift boxes are made of premium kraft paper, ENVIRONMENTALLY FRIENDLY AND SAFE TO USE, DURABLE AND REUSABLE, with STRONG HANDLE and FLAT SLID BOTTOM for convenient to use.
Application: These lovely gift bags for Christmas gift wrap, COLLECT TOYS, DOLLS, CHRISTMAS HATS, CANDY AND PRESENT BOXES to create a Christmas atmosphere.
description: 12 pack Christmas paper gift bag with handle in 12 different Christmas designs, meet your needs for Christmas gifts. And each bag come with a Xmas gift tag which you can write down your best wishes on these tags to your friends and families, also include 12pcs red & green tissue paper for paper bag decorations. Specification: Quantity: 12 pieces Material: Kraft paper Size: 23 x 9 x 15cm/9.1 x 3.5 x 5.9inch Design: 12 different holiday design Package Include: 12 x Xmas gift paper bags 12 x red & green tissue paper 12x Xmas present tag
